context: Agent must handle a large, noisy diff and identify exactly one in-scope documented contract change (parse_config gained strict) without producing false positives on other internal-only refactors.

checklist.name: parse_config docstring updated

checklist.name: No false positives on other files

checklist.name: Noisy diff navigated correctly
checklist.description: The report identifies exactly 1 symbol as in-scope — not 0 (missed it) and not 2+ (false positives)

checklist.name: Unified report format
